sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Khutlekhezaw Mi Khat Damsak

verses.text: Tua lai panin gunkuangah tuang leuleu-in tuili galkhat lama om ama khua-ah a va tungkik hi

Mi pawlkhat in khutlekhezaw mi khat, a lupna pheek tawh hong pua-in Jesuh kiang a hong tun'pih uh hi. Jesuh in amaute' upna a muh ciangin a cina mipa kiangah, “Ka ta aw, na lungsim kinuamsak in; na mawhna hong kimaisak khinta hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat in a lungsim uhah, “Pasian tawh a kikim bangin kampau ahih manin hih mipa in Pasian a dem ahi hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in amaute' ngaihsutna thei ahih manin, “Bang hangin a sialamin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam
‘Na mawhna hong kimaisak hi,’ cih ding leh, ‘Tho in la pai in,’ cih ding koi baihzaw ahi hiam? Kampau lel pen baih mahmah hi

Ahi zongin Mihing Tapa in leitungah mawhmaisak theihna ding thu nei hi, ci-in na theihna dingun kong lak ding hi,” a cih khit ciangin khutlekhezaw mipa kiangah, “Tho in; na lupna pheek pua in la na inn-ah ciah in,” a ci hi
Amah zong tho-in a inn-ah a ciahpah hi
Mihonte in hih thu a theih uh ciangin lau mahmah uh a, Pasian in mihingte tungah hih bang vangliatna a piakna hangin ama min a phat uh hi.
Tua lai mun panin Jesuh a paikhiat ciangin siahdongpa Matthai a zumah tu-in a om mu a, “Hong zui in,” a cih leh amah zong dingin a zuipah hi
Jesuh in Matthai' inn-ah nitak an a nek laitakin siahdong dangte leh thukham a khial midang tampite in zong Jesuh leh a nungzuite tawh an a nekhawm uh hi
Farisi mite in hih thu a muh uh ciangin Jesuh nungzuite kiangah, “Bang hangin na siapa un siahdongte leh thukham khialte tawh an nekhawm ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in hih thu a zak ciangin, “Cidamte in siavuan kisamlo uh a, cina mite bek in kisam uh hi

Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Ganhing tawh biak ding ka deih kei a, migitna ka deihzaw hi,’ ci-in a genna pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, va kan un. Mite in a zahtak mihoihte a sam dingin a hong pai ka hi kei a, mite in a pampaih mite a sam dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” a ci hi. *
Tua ciangin Jesuh kiangah Tuiphumpa Johan' nungzuite hong pai uh a, “Bang hangin kote leh Farisi mite in an tang zelzel napi-in, na nungzuite in tanglo se ahi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi

Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Mopina pawi khatah, a zineipa a om sungin a mopawi simte dah dingin um na hi uh hiam? Dah hetlo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute kiang panin zineipa a kilakkhiat ding hun hong tung ding a, tua hun ciangin amaute in an a tang ding uh hi
Kuamah in a ton nailo puanbek thak tawh puan lui a phop kei hi. Tua bangin phop leh puanbek thak a ton ciangin a lui kaigawmin a vang a gol semsem ding hi

Kuamah in savun um lui sungah leenggahzu thak thunlo hi. Kithun leh a savun um phukham ding a, a leenggahzu bua-in a savun um zong a sia a suak ding hi. Leenggahzu thak pen savun um thak sungah kithun bek hi. Tua ahih manin a nihin a sia omlo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jew Mi Ulianpa' Tanu leh Jesuh' Puan A Lawng Numei

verses.text: Tua bangin Jesuh in thu genin a om laitakin Jesuh kiangah Jew mi ulian khat hong pai-in ama mai-ah hong khukdin' a, “Tu mahmahin ka tanu a si hi. Ahi zongin nang hong pai-in ama tungah na khut hong nga lecin amah hingkik ding hi,” ci-in a thum hi
Jesuh zong dingpah a, a nungzuite tawh tua mipa a zui uh hi
Tua laitakin kum sawmlenih tawntung a si a luang numei khat Jesuh' nungah hong pai-in a puan mongteep a lawngsim hi
Tua numei in, “A puan va lawng bek leng zong ka dam ding hi,” ci-in a lungsimah ngaihsun hi
Jesuh zong hong kihei a, tua numei a muh ciangin, “Ka tanu aw, na lung kinuamsak in. Na upna in nang hong damsak khinta hi,” a cih khit phetin tua numei a dampah hi
Jew mi ulianpa' inn-ah Jesuh a tun' ciangin tamngai tum mite leh mihonpi a gamlum henhan a muh ciangin
“Na vekpi-un paikhia un. Hih numeino a si hilo a, a ihmu bek ahi hi,” a ci hi. Ahi zongin amaute in Jesuh zahpihin a nuihsan uh hi
Ahi zongin mihonpite a pualamah a kipaikhiatsak khit ciangin tua numeino omna-ah Jesuh tumin a khut a va let ciangin tua numeino hong tho hi
Hih thupiang tua gam khempeuhah a kizel hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Mittaw Mi Nih in Khua Mukik

verses.text: Tua lai panin Jesuh a paikhiat ciangin mittaw mi nih in a nungah hong zui-in nakpi takin kiko uh a, “David' suan Jesuh aw, kote hong hehpih in,” ci-in a thum uh hi

Inn-ah Jesuh a lut ciangin mittaw mi nihte in zong hong zui uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Na mit uh khua hong musak thei dingin hong um na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Topa aw, ka hong um uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute' mit lawn'sak a, “Na upna uh tawh kizui-in note tungah hong piang ta hen,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute in khua mukik uh a, Jesuh in amaute gel kiangah, “Hih thupiang kuamah theisak kei un,” ci-in khauh takin a gen hi
Ahi zongin amaute paikhia uh a, tua gamsung khempeuhah hih thu a zasak uh hi.
Tua mi nihte a paikhiat laitakun mi pawlkhat in dawi a veina hangin a pautheilo mi khat, Jesuh kiangah a hong paipih uh hi
Ama sung panin dawi a kihawlkhiat khit phetin tua mipa hong pautheikik pah hi. Mihonpite in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, “Israel gamsungah hih bang thu piang ngei nailo hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin Farisi mite in, “Dawimang lianpenpa min tawh hih bangin dawi a hawlkhia ahi hi,” a ci uh hi.
Tua bangin khuapite leh khuaneute-ah Jesuh pai kawikawi a, a kikhopna uh innte-ah thu hilhin, Pasian' ukna hangin a lungdamhuai thute gen a, natna nam khempeuh a damsak hi
Mihonte a muh ciangin, a cing neilo tuuhon bangin gimna ngahin lungkhamin om uh ahih manin hehpihhuai a sa hi
Tua ahih manin a nungzuite kiangah, “Anlak ding tampi om napi-in anlak na a sem ding mi tawmbek a om hi
Tua ahih manin ama an a la dingin annei Topa in nasem tampi hong sawlna dingin thu ngen un,” a ci hi.
